_comment: 遊戲場景 → ACE-Step prompt 預設對照表。被 batch_game_bgm.py 讀取。所有皆為純音樂(instrumental)。

presets.name: main_menu
presets.label: 主選單 / 標題畫面
presets.tags: ambient, cinematic, soft synth pad, gentle piano, calm, hopeful, 70 BPM, instrumental

presets.name: exploration
presets.label: 探索 / 世界地圖
presets.tags: orchestral adventure, strings, flute, light percussion, uplifting, wonder, 100 BPM, instrumental

presets.name: town_peaceful
presets.label: 小鎮 / 和平區域
presets.tags: folk, acoustic guitar, accordion, warm, cozy, playful, 110 BPM, instrumental

presets.name: battle
presets.label: 一般戰鬥
presets.tags: epic orchestral battle, war drums, brass, fast strings, intense, heroic, 140 BPM, instrumental

presets.name: boss
presets.label: Boss 戰
presets.tags: dark epic orchestral, choir, heavy drums, dissonant brass, ominous, powerful, 150 BPM, instrumental

presets.name: stealth_tension
presets.label: 潛行 / 緊張
presets.tags: dark ambient, low drone, sparse percussion, tense, eerie, 80 BPM, instrumental

presets.name: victory
presets.label: 勝利 jingle
presets.tags: triumphant orchestral fanfare, brass, timpani, choir, victorious, 120 BPM, instrumental

presets.name: game_over
presets.label: 失敗 / Game Over
presets.tags: descending sad piano, somber strings, melancholic, slow, instrumental

presets.name: retro_8bit
presets.label: 復古像素關卡
presets.tags: chiptune, 8-bit, energetic, arpeggio, retro game, adventurous, 150 BPM, instrumental

presets.name: ambient_cave
presets.label: 洞窟氛圍
presets.tags: dark ambient drone, cave, reverb, eerie, no melody, instrumental

presets.name: ambient_space
presets.label: 太空氛圍
presets.tags: space ambient, ethereal pad, cosmic, slow, instrumental

presets.name: sfx_levelup
presets.label: 升級 / 獲得物品音效
presets.tags: magical sparkle arpeggio, harp, bells, uplifting, short, instrumental

presets.name: sfx_transition
presets.label: 過場 stinger
presets.tags: cinematic transition, swell, brass hit, riser, dramatic, short, instrumental

presets.name: sfx_ui_chime
presets.label: UI 提示音(音樂性)
presets.tags: single bright synth chime, bell, clean, short, instrumental
